note: Arch-tagged pins; binary and image pins coexist here. The amd64 appliance MUST re-resolve the docker-compose-linux-x86_64 asset and re-verify its own sha256 - these aarch64 values do not transfer.

jellyfin.note: upgraded 10.10.7 -> 10.11.11 (EF Core migration library.db->jellyfin.db); arm64 manifest digest; amd64 re-resolves

kavita.note: upgraded 0.8.7 -> 0.9.0.2 (Kavita OIDC/SSO added upstream in v0.8.8) for SSO Phase 1. STAYED in the LinuxServer family (config volume /config layout + PUID/PGID preserved); the official ghcr.io/kareadita/kavita uses /kavita/config + a different user model, so a family switch would be a risky cross-layout DB migration. arm64 manifest digest; amd64 re-resolves.

samba.note: SMB drop-zone share (29.sh). env-driven multi-share (ACCOUNT_*/SAMBA_VOLUME_CONFIG_*); arm64 manifest digest, amd64 re-resolves. ':latest' tag is volatile - digest is the law.

qbittorrent.note: Ep4 Pass4a arr-stack + Jellyseerr. arm64 manifest digest; amd64 re-resolves. ':latest' volatile - digest is the law.

sonarr.note: Ep4 Pass4a arr-stack + Jellyseerr. arm64 manifest digest; amd64 re-resolves. ':latest' volatile - digest is the law.

jellyseerr.note: Ep4 Pass4a arr-stack + Jellyseerr. arm64 manifest digest; amd64 re-resolves. ':latest' volatile - digest is the law.

flaresolverr.note: Ep4 Pass4b CloudFlare-bypass proxy for Prowlarr (1337x/EZTV). INTERNAL ONLY - no public subdomain. arm64 manifest digest; amd64 re-resolves.

gluetun.note: Ep4 Pass5 NordVPN WireGuard gateway for qBittorrent. arm64 manifest digest; amd64 re-resolves. ':latest' volatile - digest is the law.

wizard.source: wizard/ (our own app.py + pinned requirements.txt) - NOT a registry pull
wizard.note: Pinned input is the base-image digest. amd64 appliance re-resolves the linux/amd64 base digest. Phase 1 (34.sh) added a two-stage build: node:20-alpine (frontend_build_base) compiles the Vite/React SPA; the python:3.13-slim runtime serves dist/ + the /api layer. Both digests are arm64 manifest digests; amd64 re-resolves.

jellyseerr_patched.source: wizard-ext/jellyseerr (Fallenbagel/jellyseerr v2.7.3 + 1 else-if patch to server/middleware/auth.ts) - NOT a registry pull
jellyseerr_patched.patch: checkUser reads Remote-User header -> auto-auth matching jellyfinUsername (Ep4 trusted-header SSO). Build is pnpm@9 (upstream toolchain), arm64-native; amd64 appliance re-resolves node:22-alpine + rebuilds.

Intro Skipper.reason: upstream manifest host redirecting to HTML; sideloaded release zip
